//notes: does not seem to be taking interchangeable panels
should be either repaired in-place or be only replaceable
description: A simple vest meant to protect from cuts, stabs, and pistol-caliber bullets.  Worn under other clothes by protection details, police officers, and businesspeople afraid of being shot.

variants.description: A plain-looking vest with adjustable cummerbunds.  Meant to be worn under everyday clothes.  The cooling mesh lining is meant to help with the comfort.  It is rated for NIJ IIIA ballistic protection, which means protection against pistol-caliber bullets; as well as NIJ II stab and NIJ II spike protection, meaning it should resist most everyday blades.  <variant:black>

A plain-looking vest with adjustable cummerbunds.  Meant to be worn under everyday clothes.  The cooling mesh lining is meant to help with the comfort.  It is rated for NIJ IIIA ballistic protection, which means protection against pistol-caliber bullets; as well as NIJ II stab and NIJ II spike protection, meaning it should resist most everyday blades.  <variant:white>

//weight: a similar, lighter-protection vest from SafeGuard is stated to weigh 1.76 kg (panels only)
we add 25% for weight of added material to bring it up to NIJ IIIA protection, plus the vest itself (what carries the panels)

notes: thickness is doubled to account for two sides

//longest_side: for the sake of simplicity, we assume it doesn't fold easily
//flags: worn on SKINTIGHT layer because it's intended to be worn covertly, under everyday clothes

//notes: we currently model this item as not taking interchangeable panels
should be either repaired in-place or be only replaceable
description: A plain-looking ballistic vest with an embedded soft ballistic insert.  The insert is intended to stop the most common pistol rounds on the market, such as 9mm.  Often worn by police officers and security personnel while on duty.

variants.description: A plain nylon outer shell of a vest with a soft armor insert.  The insert is rated for NIJ II protection against bullets, and will hold its own against some of the most common rounds, such as the 9×19mm.  <variant:black>

A plain nylon outer shell of a vest with a soft armor insert.  The insert is rated for NIJ II protection against bullets, and will hold its own against some of the most common rounds, such as the 9×19mm.  <variant:navy>

A plain nylon outer shell of a vest with a soft armor insert.  The insert is rated for NIJ II protection against bullets, and will hold its own against some of the most common rounds, such as the 9×19mm.  <variant:coyote>

A plain nylon outer shell of a vest with a soft armor insert.  The insert is rated for NIJ II protection against bullets, and will hold its own against some of the most common rounds, such as the 9×19mm.  <variant:white>

//weight: 1290 g ('less than 1.3 KG', vest) + [0.87 lbs = 394.63 g] (panel) = 1684.63 g

notes: thickness (2 mm, approximate) is doubled to account for two sides

//material: we roughly calculate the presence of (for now embedded) Kevlar by the ratio of the volume of the insert to the vest

//thickness: we leave off 0.01 in = 0.254 mm as armor insert shell/outer cover

//coverage: approximated from large ballistic plate coverage (38% per front/back), as with plate carriers

//thickness: we leave off 0.01 in = 0.254 mm as armor insert shell/outer cover
